fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location where the internal pick is being performed.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.

fields.name: Assignment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the user was assigned the activity.

fields.name: Assignment Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the user was assigned the activity.

fields.name: Sorting Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method by which the warehouse internal pick lines are sorted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Contains the code for the number series that you selected for the program to use when it assigns a document number to an internal pick header.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that someone has attached a comment to this warehouse internal pick.

fields.name: To Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin in which you want the items to be placed when they are picked.

fields.name: To Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the zone in which you want the items to be placed when they are picked.

fields.name: Document Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document status of the internal pick.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warehouse activity must be completed.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the internal pick is open or released.
